title: An Earth-Based Telescope Observes an Alien Galaxy

scenes.text: An Earth-based telescope is capturing the elusive Andromeda galaxy.
This telescope has a 3,200 megapixel resolution, providing unprecedented detail.
It captures images at an incredible rate of 700 photos every night.
This technology allows us to peer deep into the cosmos.
scenes.label: PEERING INTO COSMOS

scenes.text: Follow if curiosity runs your brain.

description: An Earth-based telescope in La Palma captures the Andromeda galaxy with powerful technology. Follow for more exciting cosmic discoveries!
